title: WAI-Session-Log.jsonl retired — no agent writes to it, use sessions/track_*.jsonl
signal: WAI-Session-Log.jsonl appears in wai.md and wai-status.md as an active file but no agent has a write contract for it. It is always empty. Session tracking is handled by sessions/track_*.jsonl files. Fix: mark WAI-Session-Log.jsonl as retired in all references. Direct agents to sessions/ directory for session tracking.
